textByHash.1de7364bd1342283f66e27d9add41799e6ed0bd0: Patients, patients everywhere! We need to get these soldiers up and fighting again!
textByHash.cbdeeb6c074eac82a9e07029823ed52a99fea34d: I don't have time to chat, I have patients to attend to.
textByHash.3ababbe4843388476c1b3bda35b58ec8653ed596: I can't take much more of this. As soon as we help one patient, another comes in!
textByHash.7cb971d4155f749b2eb9dc52e9e1f91795c0a79a: I hope we can stop the lizardmen, I can't take much more of this. As soon as we help one patient, another comes in.
textByHash.71a79171b5d7922163d2ddc31cefecc6c23d4ae2: Argh! Where are the bandages? I've got to get on with my job, please leave me be.
textByHash.1cbe4996768f2c85c65848868506b04b793bb1d3: Either help out or get out of the way!
